hero.title: Turn PDFs into Accessible Alt Text with AI.
hero.subtitle: Generate fast, accurate, WCAG-compliant captions for every image in your documents. Arohio extracts figures, charts, and tables, then writes clear, context-aware alt text you can review and export.

image.alt: Illustration of PDF document being processed

steps.title: From PDF to Alt Text in 3 Steps

items.title: Upload PDF
items.description: Drag & drop your file or import from Drive. We support long reports and scanned PDFs.

items.title: Extract Figures
items.description: We detect images, charts, and tables—cleaning the crop and reading nearby context automatically.

items.title: Generate Alt Text
items.description: AI writes WCAG-ready captions you can tweak and export back to an accessible PDF.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to turn complex PDFs into accessible, WCAG-ready documents.

cards.title: WCAG Compliance
cards.description: Generate alt text that follows WCAG guidance and PDF/UA tagging best practices. Built-in validators help teams meet accessibility standards at scale.

cards.title: Accurate Captions
cards.description: Context-aware captions tuned for screen readers—no “image of …” fluff. It reads nearby text to capture purpose and relationships.

cards.title: Broad PDF Support
cards.description: Works with reports, research papers, invoices, and image-heavy documents—scanned or digital—without manual pre-processing.

cards.title: AI-Powered Engine
cards.description: Modern vision-language models generate high-quality captions in seconds with confidence scores and automatic cropping for figures.

cards.title: Editable & Customizable
cards.description: Review, tweak, and standardize style across teams with reusable presets. Control tone, verbosity, and formatting from one place.

cards.title: Quality Assurance
cards.description: Catch issues before export with automatic validations and warnings. See exactly what needs attention and why.

cards.title: Image → Text (OCR)
cards.description: Extract text from embedded images and standalone files with high accuracy, including tables, diagrams, and math where supported.

cards.title: Image → PDF
cards.description: Combine images into an accessible PDF with captions embedded where needed. Control order, layout, and tagging.

cards.title: PDF → Excel (Tables)
cards.description: Detects tables reliably and exports clean spreadsheets for analysis. Multi-page tables are merged with headers and units preserved.
